title: Wet sand
description:
Sand touching water will wet over time, creating beautiful and beaches.

Wet sand defies gravity and can grow sugar cane without water neraby!
body:
Sand (red sand too) wets when placed next to water up to three blocks with different humidity levels. This creates beautiful gradient beaches and a couple of cool mechanics, as wet sand defies gravity and is humid enough for sugar cane to grow in it. It can also be used to automate concrete crafting.

You can dehydrate the sands with an empty bottle, one state at a time.

**Current 1.20.1 beta release doesnt have wet suspicious sands, as I am having some issues keeping its content between state changes.**

_Ports to forge/neoforge are not planned as we dont have the resources to do them and there are tools like [sinytra connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) that should make it work for those platforms_
